description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with three above-ground stories, featuring a flat roof with green spaces and a rooftop terrace. The facade is predominantly white with large, square windows arranged in a regular pattern, and the ground floor includes a covered carport with two parked cars. The property is surrounded by a paved driveway and several trees, providing a landscaped urban setting. The main entryway is recessed under the upper floors, with a simple, minimalistic design and no visible porch or decorative columns. The house has clean lines, a boxy silhouette, and a strong emphasis on geometric forms, typical of contemporary architecture. The rooftop includes both open and green areas, suggesting a focus on outdoor living and sustainability.
description: A modern, three-story cubic house with a flat green roof, large square windows, and a covered carport, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered carport with two cars, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, green rooftop, and the driveway extending to the left with more visible trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, rooftop terrace, and additional landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the carport from the side, the driveway, and the alignment of trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry under upper floors, minimalistic with no porch or decorative columns, directly accessible from the driveway.
